rationale: The citing paper’s core constructs include reward proximity/attainment effects on engagement in a reward-program-like app, which closely aligns with the cited paper’s goal-gradient mechanism (effort acceleration as goal distance shrinks, plus illusionary progress) in loyalty/reward programs. Given this strong conceptual overlap and a confirmed DOI match (10.1509/jmkr.43.1.39), the citation is plausibly foundational/mechanistic rather than an obvious incidental mention.
